mapper.select:
/* transferMapper.getNotRegUsimCust */
WITH BASE_DAY AS ( /*공통코드 (현재7일)*/ SELECT TO_NUMBER(CD_VAL) AS DAY_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0286' AND USG_YN = 'Y' ) SELECT A.REQUEST_KEY , RES_NO , REQ_USIM_SN , (CSTMR_MOBILE_FN || CSTMR_MOBILE_MN || CSTMR_MOBILE_RN) AS DSTADDR , TO_CHAR(C.RVISN_DTTM + 5 , 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) AS OPEN_EXP_DATE , D.DLVRY_TYPE , (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID AND ROWNUM = 1) AS CNTPNT_SHOP_NM FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP A , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP B , (SELECT REQUEST_KEY , RVISN_DTTM FROM MCP_REQUEST_NOW_DLVRY@DL_MCP WHERE DLVRY_STATE_CODE = '04' AND SVC_RSLT_CD = '00' AND REQ_TYPE = '02' AND TRUNC(RVISN_DTTM) BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 4 AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 1 ) C , MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP D WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = D.REQUEST_KEY AND REQ_USIM_SN IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT A.REQUEST_KEY , RES_NO , REQ_USIM_SN , (CSTMR_MOBILE_FN || CSTMR_MOBILE_MN || CSTMR_MOBILE_RN) AS DSTADDR , TO_CHAR(A.REQ_IN_DAY + C.DAY_VAL , 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) AS OPEN_EXP_DATE , D.DLVRY_TYPE , (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID AND ROWNUM = 1) AS CNTPNT_SHOP_NM FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP A , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP B , BASE_DAY C , MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP D WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = D.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND REQ_USIM_SN IS NULL AND D.DLVRY_TYPE = '04' AND A.PSTATE = '00' AND TRUNC(REQ_IN_DAY) BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE - (C.DAY_VAL - 1)) AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 1

/* transferMapper.getNotOpenNowDlvry */
WITH BASE_DAY AS ( SELECT TO_NUMBER(CD_VAL) AS DAY_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0286' AND USG_YN = 'Y' ) SELECT A.REQUEST_KEY , RES_NO , REQ_USIM_SN , (CSTMR_MOBILE_FN || CSTMR_MOBILE_MN || CSTMR_MOBILE_RN) AS DSTADDR , TO_CHAR(C.RVISN_DTTM + 5 , 'YYYYMMDD' ) AS OPEN_EXP_DATE , D.DLVRY_TYPE FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP A , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP B , (SELECT REQUEST_KEY , RVISN_DTTM FROM MCP_REQUEST_NOW_DLVRY@DL_MCP WHERE DLVRY_STATE_CODE = '04' AND SVC_RSLT_CD = '00' AND REQ_TYPE = '02' AND TO_CHAR(RVISN_DTTM + 5, 'YYYYMMDD') < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD')) C , MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP D WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = D.REQUEST_KEY AND A.PSTATE <> '40' AND REQ_USIM_SN IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT A.REQUEST_KEY , RES_NO , REQ_USIM_SN , (CSTMR_MOBILE_FN || CSTMR_MOBILE_MN || CSTMR_MOBILE_RN) AS DSTADDR , TO_CHAR(A.REQ_IN_DAY + C.DAY_VAL , 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) AS OPEN_EXP_DATE , D.DLVRY_TYPE FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP A , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP B , BASE_DAY C , MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP D WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = D.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND REQ_USIM_SN IS NULL AND D.DLVRY_TYPE = '04' AND A.PSTATE <> '40' AND TRUNC(REQ_IN_DAY) < TRUNC(SYSDATE) - C.DAY_VAL
